name: multiple-patterns
description: Conversation with multiple recurring patterns across different corrections

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: I'll organize the components as components/user/UserCard.tsx and components/user/UserProfile.tsx

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: I prefer a flat structure: components/UserCard.tsx and components/UserProfile.tsx

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: Here's the code with double quotes for strings.

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Single quotes only, please. That's our team standard.

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: I'll use Promise.then() chains for the async operations.

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Let's use async/await instead. It's more readable.

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: Another function with double strings: const message = "Hello World";

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Please use single quotes: const message = 'Hello World';

expected_analysis.analysis_summary: User prefers flat component structure, single quotes, and async/await patterns

expected_patterns.description: Prefers single quotes over double quotes for strings
